name: create_user_preferences_table
sql_up:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_preferences (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    primary_currency VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'USD',
    timezone VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT 'Asia/Jerusalem',
    default_stop_loss REAL DEFAULT 5.0,
    default_target_price REAL DEFAULT 10.0,
    default_commission REAL DEFAULT 1.0,
    default_status_filter VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'open',
    default_type_filter VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'swing',
    default_account_filter VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'all',
    default_date_range_filter VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'this_week',
    default_search_filter VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT '',
    console_cleanup_interval INTEGER DEFAULT 60000,
    data_refresh_interval INTEGER DEFAULT 5,
    primary_data_provider VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'yahoo',
    secondary_data_provider VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'google',
    cache_ttl INTEGER DEFAULT 5,
    max_batch_size INTEGER DEFAULT 25,
    request_delay INTEGER DEFAULT 200,
    retry_attempts INTEGER DEFAULT 2,
    retry_delay INTEGER DEFAULT 5,
    auto_refresh BOOLEAN DEFAULT 0,
    verbose_logging BOOLEAN DEFAULT 0,
    numeric_value_colors_json TEXT,
    entity_colors_json TEXT,
    created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at DATETIME,
    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users (id)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_user_preferences_user_id ON user_preferences (user_id);
